name: net
description: Network and JSON primitives for fetching data and parsing responses.
author: Phograph Team

primitives.name: http-get
primitives.description: Fetch a URL via HTTP GET and return the response body

primitives.name: http-post
primitives.description: POST data to a URL and return the response body

primitives.name: json-parse
primitives.description: Parse a JSON string into a dictionary or list
